name: apple-hig
description: Apple Human Interface Guidelines guidance for design, UI, and UX work on Apple-platform products.

interface.shortDescription: Apple-native design, UI, and UX guidance
interface.longDescription: A portable Apple Human Interface Guidelines skill for Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode. Use it for any Apple-platform design, UI, or UX work, including design review, SwiftUI implementation, accessibility, and cross-device adaptation.
defaultPrompt: Review this app for Apple HIG alignment
Make this SwiftUI screen feel native on iOS and iPadOS
Create a cross-device Apple platform design checklist
